name: Self-hosted homelab on K3s
description: Four-node K3s cluster on commodity hardware sitting at home. Hands-on with the full delivery path — packaging, deployment, networking, observability — for the services I actually use, including this site.

name: Codefolio App
description: You're looking at it. kakde.eu runs on this — same architecture I used at Audi: Scala 3 end-to-end, Scala.js + scalajs-react on the frontend, ZIO 2 + zio-http on the backend over Postgres, Redis, and Mongo. Packaged as a container and deployed to my homelab cluster. The GitHub link below has the code if you want to see how it's built.

name: Sonatype Maven Central Publisher
description: Open-source Gradle plugin I authored and maintain on the official Plugin Portal. Publishes JVM artefacts to Maven Central through Sonatype's Central Portal API. Demo projects: github.com/ani2fun/plugin-demo.
